match.userMessage:

  "sceneId": "scene_001",
  "sceneNumber": 1,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "Handheld close-up: fingers tap a glowing laptop keyboard with crisp, editorial precision, macro details on matte black keys and warm skin tones under bright natural window light. Rain streaks the pane behind, golden-hour warmth catching droplets.",
    "dialogue": []
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Handheld Macro Keyboard",
    "durationSeconds": 4,
    "location": "INT. SLEEK NEWSROOM - NIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "night",
    "storyBeat": "Establishes tense newsroom atmosphere and reporter at work"
  },
  "prompts": {
    "visual": {
      "fullPrompt": "Handheld macro close-up in modern social-first product photography style with tactile editorial energy showing REPORTER wearing crisp button-up blouse in neutral tones fingers tapping a glowing laptop keyboard with crisp editorial precision on matte black keys under bright natural window light inside an airy modern minimalist newsroom at night with rain streaks on the large pane behind and golden-hour warmth catching droplets on the glass plus white desks and minimal flat-lay arrangements visible in soft background bokeh crisp whites and neutral beiges dominating the palette dynamic handheld camera movement with shallow depth of field emphasizing material textures and immediate real light",
      "negativePrompt": "heavy diffusion, floating screens, text elements, holograms, stylized illustrations, overprocessed color, blurred motion trails",
      "components": {
        "sceneDescription": "Handheld macro close-up of fingers actively tapping laptop keyboard in a tense newsroom setting",
        "subject": "REPORTER hands typing on laptop keyboard wearing neutral blouse",
        "environment": "Airy sleek modern newsroom at night with large rain-streaked windows and minimalist white desks",
        "lighting": "Bright natural window light with golden-hour warmth on rain droplets creating clean directional shadows",
        "camera": "Handheld macro lens with natural micro-movement and shallow depth of field",
        "composition": "Tight focus on keyboard action with rain window softly blurred behind and desk elements in bokeh",
        "style": "Modern editorial product photography with tactile real-life energy and crisp color-matched neutrals",
        "technical": "High detail macro capture emphasizing textures and materials under natural light",
        "atmosphere": "Focused energetic newsroom under deadline pressure with fresh sensory immediacy"
      }
    }
  },
  "continuity": {
    "characterTags": [
      "reporter"
    ],
    "environmentTag": "sleek_newsroom_minimal_white_rain",
    "elementTags": [],

    "lightingSetup": "Bright natural window light combined with warm golden-hour accents and punchy editorial clarity",

}
</CURRENT_SCENE>

      "fullPrompt": "Locked wide shot of an airy minimalist white desk featuring a clean flat-lay arrangement with a notepad and coffee cup in soft beige tones set against a crisp white backdrop inside a sleek modern newsroom at night, large rain-streaked windows visible in the background, bright natural window light mixed with warm golden-hour accents creating clean directional shadows, high-key airy atmosphere with crisp whites and neutral tones, modern editorial photography style, shallow depth of field emphasizing the curated minimal surfaces, anamorphic lens with subtle film grain",

<DIRECTOR_STYLE>
(Strictly apply camera movement and pacing preferences)
{
  "mood": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool",
  "artStyle": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save",
  "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Golden hour warmth for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast",
  "colorPalette": [
    "#FFFFFF",
    "#F0E6D3",
    "#D4536D",
    "#1A1A1A",
    "#E8F4E8"
  ],
  "cameraWork": "Dynamic mix of handheld and locked shots with consistent energy. Handheld with natural micro-movement for lifestyle moments -- hands interacting, daily rituals, real context. Quick-cut to locked beauty frames for hero product shots. Macro details on textures and surfaces. Overhead flat-lays directly above. Eye-level and slightly above angles. Shallow depth of field on tactile details. Energetic pacing -- no lingering, every frame earns its time",
  "referenceFilms": [
    "Rhode Skin Instagram",
    "Glossier Visual Identity",
    "Summer Fridays Campaigns",
    "Drunk Elephant Content"
  ],
  "colorGrading": "Clean and bright with true-to-life color. Whites are crisp, skin tones warm and natural. Minimal processing -- the product looks like it does in your hand. Slight warmth in highlights, lifted shadows keeping everything airy. One accent color pops against neutral base"
}
</DIRECTOR_STYLE>

<ASPECT_RATIO>
16:9
</ASPECT_RATIO>
